creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #0)

The "make -j 6 buildworld" on the dual-processor, each dual-core, G5 completed normally. Its install booted.

A dual processor, one-core per processor, G4 PowerMac is now using that same SSD to attempt "make -j 3 buildworld". It will be some time before it completes normally (if it does).
